Nodes.Message: Oh hi, welcome to the mod I made! Along with Tree too.
Unfortunately he doesn't wanna show himself, but I'll introduce myself!
I'm Dummy, the creator! I manage the quests and some other thing-a-majig, though however the sprites you see are usually not mine!
There is also Tree, you may ocassionally see him describe a ship or weapon. They make the quest ideas and usually directs me on what to do next!
Oh also, have some starter gear from me!

Well then, go now! I'll be narrating over the quests you might get! Oh and there's a faction reputation system in-place, try doing their missions! Also make sure to look at your inventory if you wanna contact me!
